---
title: "Get in touch!📬"
---
## Project ideas

I enjoy working collaboratively, and I am always interested in projects that pull real insight out of messy environmental data and turn it into something actionable. If you want to collaborate, exchange ideas, or discuss work at the intersection of ecology, climate change, remote sensing, and AI in ecology, feel free to reach out.

Let's chat! [email](mailto:pachecoriano.c@gmail.com).
